channel.title: 音楽ニュースリスト - Bluesky Feed
channel.description: 音楽ニュースサイトの発信をまとめて確認するためのリスト

item.title: The launch, using a dummy warhead, took place the same day A…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: The launch, using a dummy warhead, took place the same day Australia and Fiji signed a mutual defense treaty meant to counter Chinese influence in the Pacific. n.pr/4glJ05f
item.content:encoded: The launch, using a dummy warhead, took place the same day Australia and Fiji signed a mutual defense treaty meant to counter Chinese influence in the Pacific. n.pr/4glJ05f

item.title: Iranian state television said the tanker came under attack a…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Iranian state television said the tanker came under attack after ignoring warnings but did not directly claim the assault. n.pr/4f72fgx
item.content:encoded: Iranian state television said the tanker came under attack after ignoring warnings but did not directly claim the assault. n.pr/4f72fgx

item.title: HYBE JAPANに飯島三智氏がジョイン BTSら所属の韓国大手エンタメ企業の日本支社 https://natal…
item.author: 音楽ナタリー (@music.natalie.mu)
item.description:
HYBE JAPANに飯島三智氏がジョイン
BTSら所属の韓国大手エンタメ企業の日本支社
https://natalie.mu/music/news/679672?utm_source=bluesky&utm_medium=social

飯島は新しい地図（稲垣吾郎、草彅剛、香取慎吾）らが所属する株式会社CULENの代表取締役。飯島の参画により、HYBE JAPANはJ-POPの新IPの創出と育成をさらに加速させていく。
item.content:encoded:
HYBE JAPANに飯島三智氏がジョイン
BTSら所属の韓国大手エンタメ企業の日本支社
https://natalie.mu/music/news/679672?utm_source=bluesky&utm_medium=social

飯島は新しい地図（稲垣吾郎、草彅剛、香取慎吾）らが所属する株式会社CULENの代表取締役。飯島の参画により、HYBE JAPANはJ-POPの新IPの創出と育成をさらに加速させていく。

item.title: AKB48、20年の時を経て「会いたかった」初リバイバル！最新シングル「好きish」収録曲公開 https://nat…
item.author: 音楽ナタリー (@music.natalie.mu)
item.description:
AKB48、20年の時を経て「会いたかった」初リバイバル！最新シングル「好きish」収録曲公開
https://natalie.mu/music/news/679666?utm_source=bluesky&utm_medium=social

💗スクールバッグ計画 初オリジナル曲
💗20期研究生 初の単独曲
💗向井地美音が作詞に初挑戦

#AKB48 #AKBが好きish

AKB48、20年の時を経て「会いたかった」初リバイバル！最新シングル「好きish」収録曲公開

#AKB48 #AKBが好きish

item.title: Divorce is a tool, not a weapon, says Karen McNenny, author …
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Divorce is a tool, not a weapon, says Karen McNenny, author of a new book on the subject. She explains how to end a marriage while protecting your family and your mental health. n.pr/3SOKsDp
item.content:encoded: Divorce is a tool, not a weapon, says Karen McNenny, author of a new book on the subject. She explains how to end a marriage while protecting your family and your mental health. n.pr/3SOKsDp

item.title: 【今日もあの街で名曲が 第7回】 スカート澤部渡が高田馬場で語る 「高田馬場で乗り換えて」 https://n…

「板橋に生まれたことに傷つき、悩んできた40年なんです」

item.title: The team was in the eye of a storm over a controversial phon…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: The team was in the eye of a storm over a controversial phone call from President Trump to FIFA's head about a red card on a U.S. striker. But even with the U.S. at full strength, Belgium easily won. n.pr/4vQPjTi
item.content:encoded: The team was in the eye of a storm over a controversial phone call from President Trump to FIFA's head about a red card on a U.S. striker. But even with the U.S. at full strength, Belgium easily won. n.pr/4vQPjTi

item.title: BUDDiiSがファミマTVに登場、メジャー1stシングルについて10秒で答える https://natalie.mu…
item.author: 音楽ナタリー (@music.natalie.mu)
item.description:
BUDDiiSがファミマTVに登場、メジャー1stシングルについて10秒で答える
https://natalie.mu/music/news/679602?utm_source=bluesky&utm_medium=social

#BUDDiiS
item.content:encoded:

item.title: In cities across the U.S., parades were canceled and events …
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: In cities across the U.S., parades were canceled and events were delayed because of the heat. Meanwhile, emergency rooms saw a high number of people with heat-related illnesses. n.pr/4b9Nick
item.content:encoded: In cities across the U.S., parades were canceled and events were delayed because of the heat. Meanwhile, emergency rooms saw a high number of people with heat-related illnesses. n.pr/4b9Nick

item.author: Bandcamp (@bandcamp.com)
item.description: New & Notable: Big, bright, and booming folk-y power pop songs that channel Elvis Costello and Nick Lowe in their sharp lyrics and swooping melodies.
item.content:encoded: New & Notable: Big, bright, and booming folk-y power pop songs that channel Elvis Costello and Nick Lowe in their sharp lyrics and swooping melodies.

item.title: New & Notable: It's another dazzling triumph of fantasy synt…
item.author: Bandcamp (@bandcamp.com)
item.description: New & Notable: It's another dazzling triumph of fantasy synth for the long-running Fief-lush and moody songs that conjure far-off realms.
item.content:encoded: New & Notable: It's another dazzling triumph of fantasy synth for the long-running Fief-lush and moody songs that conjure far-off realms.

item.title: The 2026 FIFA World Cup has been filled with stunning upsets…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: The 2026 FIFA World Cup has been filled with stunning upsets and emotional wins. But perhaps, most bittersweet were the final dances from some of the greatest soccer players seen in a generation.
item.content:encoded: The 2026 FIFA World Cup has been filled with stunning upsets and emotional wins. But perhaps, most bittersweet were the final dances from some of the greatest soccer players seen in a generation.

item.title: Some of the greatest footballers of a generation played thei…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Some of the greatest footballers of a generation played their final World Cup match this summer. n.pr/4vgrBic
item.content:encoded: Some of the greatest footballers of a generation played their final World Cup match this summer. n.pr/4vgrBic

item.title: Thousands of people lost coverage over as little as $8 in de…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Thousands of people lost coverage over as little as $8 in delinquent payments. They didn't know their zero-dollar premiums had gone up and they owed money. Most now can't get coverage until 2027.
item.content:encoded: Thousands of people lost coverage over as little as $8 in delinquent payments. They didn't know their zero-dollar premiums had gone up and they owed money. Most now can't get coverage until 2027.

item.description: Jeff Rosenstock booked for 311 cruise 12 years after his petition
item.content:encoded: Jeff Rosenstock booked for 311 cruise 12 years after his petition

item.title: Glasgow jazz is born from a petri dish of technical virtuosi…
item.author: Bandcamp (@bandcamp.com)
item.description: Glasgow jazz is born from a petri dish of technical virtuosity, hedonism, and the anything-goes creative spirit that comes from a city which lives its life without expectations. Here are a few of the key names helping it thrive.
item.content:encoded: Glasgow jazz is born from a petri dish of technical virtuosity, hedonism, and the anything-goes creative spirit that comes from a city which lives its life without expectations. Here are a few of the key names helping it thrive.

item.title: President Trump has made substantial efforts to curb renewab…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: President Trump has made substantial efforts to curb renewable energy development. The Ute Mountain Ute tribe in Colorado managed to bring a big solar project online anyway.
item.content:encoded: President Trump has made substantial efforts to curb renewable energy development. The Ute Mountain Ute tribe in Colorado managed to bring a big solar project online anyway.

item.content:encoded:

item.title: Texas' App Store Accountability Act requires minors to have …
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Texas' App Store Accountability Act requires minors to have their parents' permission to download most apps. The Supreme Court says the law can go into effect as lawsuits continue in lower courts. n.pr/4eMOk0f
item.content:encoded: Texas' App Store Accountability Act requires minors to have their parents' permission to download most apps. The Supreme Court says the law can go into effect as lawsuits continue in lower courts. n.pr/4eMOk0f

item.title: The Democratic candidate for Senate in Maine said he was ass…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: The Democratic candidate for Senate in Maine said he was assessing next steps after allegations of sexual assault were reported on Monday by Politico. Platner denied them as "categorically untrue."
item.content:encoded: The Democratic candidate for Senate in Maine said he was assessing next steps after allegations of sexual assault were reported on Monday by Politico. Platner denied them as "categorically untrue."

item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: The Democratic candidate for Senate in Maine said he was assessing next steps after allegations of sexual assault were reported on Monday by Politico. Platner denied them as "categorically untrue." n.pr/4eMd6O5
item.content:encoded: The Democratic candidate for Senate in Maine said he was assessing next steps after allegations of sexual assault were reported on Monday by Politico. Platner denied them as "categorically untrue." n.pr/4eMd6O5
